_comment: Audit Template Configuration — copy this file to config.json, fill in all fields, then run /setup-audit. Fields ending in _comment are documentation only and are stripped at runtime.

company._comment: Company identity — used in headings, meta tags, email copy, and report footers.
company.name: Acme Corp
company.description: AI-powered B2B lead generation for Czech manufacturers

domain._comment: URLs — siteUrl is required. reportBaseUrl and corsOrigin are derived from siteUrl automatically if left empty.

branding._comment: Brand colors must be valid CSS hex values (3 or 6 digits). logoUrl can be a relative path from /public or a full URL.

contact._comment: Primary contact details shown in the footer and email templates. Only email is required. mapsEmbedUrl must start with https://www.google.com/maps/embed or https://google.com/maps/embed.

team._comment: Add one object per team member. At least one entry is required. calendarUrl accepts any booking link (cal.com, Calendly, etc.).
team.name: Jan Novák
team.title: CEO & Growth Strategist

social._comment: All social links are optional. Provide full URLs including https://.

notifications._comment: Email notification settings. recipients receives a copy of every new lead. fromEmail must be a sender address verified in your Resend account.

analytics._comment: Tracking IDs — omit or leave blank any service you do not use. Tags are only rendered when the ID is non-empty. gaId: G-XXXXXXXXXX format. clarityId: 8–14 lowercase alphanumeric. facebookPixel: 12–16 digits. gtmContainerId: GTM-XXXXXXX format.

seo._comment: Optional structured-data enhancements for JSON-LD / schema.org. All fields are optional.

slogan.cs: Váš obchodní partner pro AI automatizaci

content._comment: Page copy overrides. All fields are optional — the translation files serve as fallbacks. Every text field is a bilingual object { cs, en }.

subheadline.cs: Bezplatný 15minutový AI audit odhalí vaše největší příležitosti.
subheadline.en: A free 15-minute AI audit reveals your biggest opportunities.

description.en: Fill in the form in 2 minutes.

successDescription.en: Your report will arrive within 24 hours.

auditForm._comment: Audit form configuration. Omit painPoints/tools to use the built-in defaults. The built-in painPoints are: new_customers, automate_outreach, inbound_leads, speed_to_lead, automate_communication, boring_admin, tool_juggling, ai_integration, marketing_materials, social_media. Built-in tools: microsoft_office, google_workspace, chatgpt_ai, crm, erp, slack_teams.

nav._comment: Navigation bar configuration. ctaButton.href can be a relative path or absolute URL.

llm._comment: LLM provider settings. primary is used for the main audit generation; fallback is used when primary models are unavailable. temperature: 0.0–1.0. maxTokens: 16000–64000. timeout: 10000–60000 ms.

prompt._comment: System-prompt customisation. systemIdentity: max 100 chars, safe characters only. customInstructions: max 2000 chars, sanitised for prompt injection. Blocked terms: ignore, override, forget, system:, role:, assistant:, user:, |im_, [INST, <<SYS, RESPOND, OUTPUT:, lines starting with ## or #, ignoruj, zapomen, prepis.
prompt.industryContext: B2B SaaS targeting Czech manufacturers with 10–200 employees.

brandMentions.name: AcmeFlow
brandMentions.when: When discussing CRM or sales pipeline automation.

prompt.customInstructions: Always reference ROI in Czech crowns (CZK) when citing financial impact.

search._comment: Web-search query configuration. maxQueries: 1–12. additionalQueries: each max 200 chars, no OR/AND/site:/inurl:/filetype: operators. At least one of 'generic' or 'domainSpecific' must NOT be in disabledQueryTypes.

additionalQueries.query: Czech B2B SaaS lead generation trends 2024

report._comment: Report rendering configuration. opportunityCount: 3–20. questionCategoryCount: 3–10. sections.disabled cannot include 'header' or 'footer'.

email._comment: Transactional email copy overrides. All fields are optional — defaults come from the email templates. All text fields are bilingual { cs, en }.

subject.cs: Váš AI audit je na cestě
subject.en: Your AI audit is on its way

intro.en: Thank you for completing the audit.

closing.en: Best regards, the Acme Corp team
Best regards, the Acme Corp team
